Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There doesn't seem to be anyone[n]in the faculty office. It might be[n]a good time to enter...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1047 0 0}I don't think we need anything else in there. C'mon, the others are probably waiting for us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1037 0 0}This side usually isn't open. We should enter from the other door.[n]{f 1 1}
